title: Everything You Need to Know About Payment Methods for Filipino Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a Filipino digital creator, pouring your heart and soul into ebooks, courses, and art. But every time you try to get paid, you hit a roadblock: PayPal's not available in your country, and Stripe's too finicky. You're not alone – thousands of creators in restricted countries struggle to get paid for their work. The good news is that there's a better way to get paid, one that's fast, secure, and doesn't require a middleman. In this post, we'll explore the world of blockchain-based payments and show you how to take control of your finances once and for all.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Blockchain-based payments are a way to move money from one person to another without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. These payments use blockchain technology, which is a public ledger that records all transactions made on a network. By using blockchain, you can send and receive payments directly, without the need for a third party. This means that you can get paid in your preferred currency, without the hassle of converting or dealing with exchange rates. It's faster, cheaper, and more secure than traditional payment methods, and it's available to anyone with an internet connection.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

When you make a payment on the blockchain, it's broadcast to the network and verified by nodes (computers that run the blockchain software). Once verified, the transaction is added to the blockchain, where it's locked in a permanent record. This ensures that the transaction can't be altered or deleted, and that the recipient actually gets the payment. The whole process happens in real-time, and it's completely transparent – anyone can see the transaction and verify that it's legitimate.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators like you, who need a fast and secure way to get paid for their work. It's particularly useful for creators in countries where traditional payment methods are limited or unreliable. With blockchain-based payments, you can get paid in your preferred currency, without the need for a third party or conversion fees. It's also ideal for creators who want to focus on their work, rather than dealing with payment processors or waiting for money to arrive.
You don't need to be a tech expert to use blockchain-based payments – our software makes it easy to set up and use.
The Components That Make It Work Together

There are several components that make blockchain-based payments work, including the blockchain network, the wallet software, and the payment gateway. The wallet software is what allows you to send and receive payments, while the payment gateway handles the actual transaction. Some payment gateways, like NOWPayments, offer a range of features and tools to help you manage your payments and get paid quickly. With the right components in place, you can take control of your finances and get paid for your work.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

So what can you do with this knowledge? First, you can start exploring the world of blockchain-based payments and learn more about the technology and the tools available. Next, you can start setting up a wallet and getting familiar with the payment gateway. Finally, you can start using this technology to get paid for your work – whether it's ebooks, courses, or art. With the Web3 Wallet Connect software, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers, and get paid in your preferred currency. It's time to take control of your finances and get paid for your work.

With no middleman and a public ledger, you can be sure that your money is safe and that you'll get paid for your work. It's a game-changer for digital creators like you.
Traditional payment methods are holding you back – it's time to switch to blockchain-based payments and take control of your finances.
